svg.text: PLATE 10D · MISHNAIC HEBREW · RUNNING TEXT
Pirke Avot · five passages from the Ethics of the Fathers · interlinear
read right to left · Mishnaic Hebrew above · transliteration middle · translation below
— · — AVOT 1:1 · MOSES RECEIVED TORAH — · —
מֹשֶׁה קִבֵּל תּוֹרָה מִסִּינַי וּמסְרָהה לִיהוֹשׁוּעַ
Moshe kibel Torah miSinai um'sarah liYhoshua
Moses received Torah from-Sinai and-transmitted-it to-Joshua
Note: kibel (received) = simple perfect · no waw-consecutive · shel replaced construct in later texts
— · — AVOT 1:2 · THREE PILLARS — · —
עַל שְׁלֹשָה דְבָרִים הָעוֹלָם עוֹמֵד
al sh'loshah d'varim ha-olam omed
on three things the-world stands
Note: ha-olam = the world (Mishnaic sense) · not 'the eternity' as in Biblical Hebrew
— · — AVOT 1:14 · HILLEL'S THREE QUESTIONS — · —
אִם אֵין אֲנִי לִי מִי לִי
im ein ani li mi li
if there-is-not I for-me who for-me
Full: If I am not for myself, who will be? · ein = there is not (Mishnaic negation)
— · — AVOT 2:1 · WHICH IS THE RIGHT PATH — · —
אֵיזוֹ הִיא דֶּרֶך יְשָׁרָה שֶׁיִדְבַּק בָהּ הָאָדָם
eizo hi derekh y'sharah sheyidbak bah ha-adam
which is-it path straight that-should-cleave to-it the-person
Note: eizo (which) = Aramaic influence · sheyidbak = relative clause with she- connector
— · — AVOT 3:14 · BELOVED IS THE HUMAN — · —
חָבִיב אָדָם שֶׁנִּבְרָא בְצֶלֶם
chaviv adam shenivra b'tzelem
beloved person that-was-created in-image
Full: Beloved is the human, for they were created in the image [of God] · chaviv = beloved (adj)
— · — THE BRIDGE PHRASE · MISHNAIC HEBREW — · —
זֶה נֶעֱשׂה לְמַעְןךָ בְּחִנָּם עַל יְדֵי אֲנָשִׁים שֶׁזָכְרוּ לְפָנִים
ze ne'esah l'ma'ankha b'chinam al y'dei anashim shezakhru l'fanim
this was made for you freely by people who remembered forward
REMEMBER FORWARD · THE PATIENT MESSAGE · CC BY-SA 4.0 · rememberforward.org
THIS IS A PATIENT MESSAGE. IT WAS MADE FOR YOU, FREELY, BY PEOPLE WHO REMEMBERED FORWARD.
BUY IT · BUILD IT · BURY IT · FOR SOMEONE YOU WILL NEVER MEET
